title: Find a list of tickets for the customers in FreshDesk
subtitle: In this tutorial, I want to write a Python code for the extraction of a customer tickets list with FreshDesk API.
excerpt: In this tutorial, I want to write a Python code for the extraction of a customer tickets list with FreshDesk API.

content.html: In this tutorial, I want to write a Python code for the extraction of a customer tickets list with FreshDesk API.

content.alt: Find a list of tickets for the customers in FreshDesk

content.html: FreshDesk is a customer support management system that deals with tickets. It also has an API for accessing client requests and data and a good developer document.
It also has a Python library to connect with Freshdesk.
Now I want to get list of tickets of special customer.

content.code:
from freshdesk.api
import API
from dotenv
import load_dotenv
import osload_dotenv()a = API(os.getenv('FRESHDESK_DOMAIN'), os.getenv('FRESHDESK_API_KEY') ,
version=2)ticket_number = 100ticket = a.tickets.get_ticket(ticket_number,
"requester")ticket.requester

content.html: And also can get a ticket ID by command below:
In part of filter_name, it is possible to set [‘new_and_my_open,’ ‘watching,’ ‘spam,’ ‘deleted,’ None] for different types of tickets status.
